sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the bridge segments, I see the bridge extends from col 16 to col 46, but there are gaps. The green block is at cols 36-39 and the blue block is at cols 42-45. The bridge has segments at cols 37, 38, 40, 41, 43, 46 but NOT at cols 36, 39, 42, 44, 45 (where the blocks are).
Wait, the bridge segments show individual cells, not contiguous blocks. The bridge seems to be a pattern of alternating white and gray cells.
Key observation: the green block is at (19, 36) and blue is at (19, 42). They're on the same row. The bridge extends between them. But when I RIGHT, the green block didn't move. This is different from before when LEFT moved the green block.
Wait, let me reconsider. Earlier when I did LEFT, the green block moved from (25, 42) to (25, 36). So LEFT moved it left by 6. But now RIGHT didn't move it right. Why?
Looking at the bridge segments more carefully:
- Bridge has segments at cols 16-46
- Green block is at cols 36-39
- Blue block is at cols 42-45
- There are bridge segments between green and blue (cols 40, 41)
- There are bridge segments to the right of blue (cols 43, 46)
So the bridge extends PAST the blue block. Maybe the green block can't move right because the blue block is blocking it?
Let me try a different approach. Maybe the goal is to overlap the green block with the red block instead. Currently:
- Red: (13, 42)
- Green: (19, 36)
- Blue: (19, 42)
To overlap green with red:
1. Move UP to get green to row 13 (from 19, need UP once)
2. Move RIGHT to get green to col 42 (from 36, need RIGHT once)
But RIGHT didn't work when green was at the same row as blue. Maybe I need to first move UP to get green above blue, then RIGHT.
Let me try UP first, then RIGHT.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Green at (19, 36), Red at (13, 42)
# To overlap green with red: UP (moves green to row 13), RIGHT (moves green to col 42)
# But RIGHT didn't work before when green was on same row as blue
# Let me try UP first to move green above blue, then RIGHT
action(['UP', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
